#+title: Fixture: SubClassOf in description list (Step 7.5.4)
#+author: ELOT test suite

# Fixture for elot/subclass-in-description-list (Step 7.5.4).
#
# - ex:Apple is a level-3 child of Classes; carries `SubClassOf :: ex:Fruit'
#   pointing at a *named* class declared elsewhere in the file as a
#   heading -- should fire the new warning.
# - ex:Sour is also a level-3 child of Classes; carries `SubClassOf ::
#   ex:Fruit and ex:hasTaste some xsd:string' -- an *anonymous* class
#   expression that happens to mention ex:Fruit but is not a bare CURIE.
#   Should NOT fire.
# - ex:Pear is a level-3 child of Classes; carries `SubClassOf ::
#   ex:Unknown' where ex:Unknown is NOT declared anywhere -- should NOT
#   fire (declared-elsewhere is part of the contract; unknown CURIE is
#   the axiom-value-curies checker's business).
# - ex:Pippin is a *level-4* child (under ex:Apple, not under Classes
#   directly); carries `SubClassOf :: ex:Apple' -- should NOT fire
#   because the heading is not a direct child of a :resourcedefs: section.

* my-ont
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: my-ont
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex
:header-args:omn: :tangle ./my-ont.omn :noweb yes
:END:

** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:

#+name: prefix-table
| prefix | uri                                         |
|--------+---------------------------------------------|
| owl:   | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#              |
| rdf:   | http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns# |
| rdfs:  | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#       |
| xsd:   | http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#           |
| skos:  | http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#        |
| ex:    | http://example.org/                         |
| exo:   | http://example.org/ont/                     |

** my-ont ontology (exo:my-ont exo:my-ont/0.0)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-ontology-declaration
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

 - rdfs:comment :: A test ontology.

** Datatypes
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-datatypes
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-class-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Fruit (ex:Fruit)
 - rdfs:label :: Fruit
*** Apple (ex:Apple)
 - SubClassOf :: ex:Fruit
**** Pippin (ex:Pippin)
 - SubClassOf :: ex:Apple
*** Sour (ex:Sour)
 - SubClassOf :: ex:Fruit and ex:hasTaste some xsd:string
*** Pear (ex:Pear)
 - SubClassOf :: ex:Unknown

** Object properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-object-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** hasTaste (ex:hasTaste)
 - rdfs:label :: hasTaste

** Data properties

:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
